canonical_invariant: If no valid object exists -> nothing happens.

bypass_paths.current_evidence: No wrangler deploy command observed in workflow scan; package deploy script is disabled.
bypass_paths.risk: A future workflow/script could call wrangler deploy without /authority -> /compile -> /validate -> /execute -> /proof.

bypass_paths.current_evidence: Local D1 migration script exists; migrations include INSERT/DELETE/schema mutations.
bypass_paths.risk: Production D1 migration apply can mutate registry state outside exact-object validation unless separately governed.

bypass_paths.current_evidence: D1 INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE statements exist in canonical runtime lifecycle handlers.
bypass_paths.risk: Any new DB write outside canonical route/lineage helpers could create implicit authority or proof bypass.

bypass_paths.current_evidence: Dispatch inputs exist and workflow asserts required decision_id, validated_object_hash, and invocation_nonce.
bypass_paths.risk: Manual dispatch could attempt execution with fabricated object material.

bypass_paths.current_evidence: Static demo object uses transfer_webhook/webhook metadata but no production webhook caller was observed.
bypass_paths.risk: Static webhook intent could be mistaken for live authority if accepted outside canonical compile/validate.

bypass_paths.current_evidence: server.js/gateway.js/worker.js throw, but registry.js and compile-decision.js remain manually invocable demo paths; Dockerfile points to disabled server.js.
bypass_paths.risk: Legacy/demo path could be wired into deployment or treated as authority without runtime validation.

bypass_paths.current_evidence: Workflow and runtime bind validated_object_hash through validate/execute/proof.
bypass_paths.risk: Changing target/scope after VALID but before execute would violate validated_object == executed_object.

bypass_paths.current_evidence: Proof request includes execution_id, decision_id, validated_object_hash, workflow, run_id, and commit_sha.
bypass_paths.risk: Proof accepted without exact execution lineage could legitimize unvalidated execution.

bypass_paths.current_evidence: Repository admin and branch protection authority are external root surfaces in runtime/sovereignty/root_authority_inventory.json; no secret values are inspected.
bypass_paths.risk: An admin/settings change could weaken workflow or branch protections outside the governed deploy lifecycle.

bypass_paths.current_evidence: Repository/environment secrets are inventoried as external root dependencies and secret material remains NOT_INSPECTED.
bypass_paths.risk: Secret or environment mutation could redirect runtime/deploy authority without becoming MindShift authority.

bypass_paths.current_evidence: Cloudflare account/token authority is classified as root/external authority; workflow deploy scan does not inspect token values.
bypass_paths.risk: A Cloudflare account or token holder could deploy directly outside /session -> /continuity -> /authority -> /compile -> /validate -> /execute -> /proof.

bypass_paths.current_evidence: Local Wrangler authority is classified as root/local bypass risk; package deploy guard is disabled and deploy:dry-run uses --dry-run.
bypass_paths.risk: A local authenticated wrangler deploy command remains a root authority escape hatch if executed outside governed workflow.

bypass_paths.current_evidence: Branch protection policy requires direct push restriction and merge governance treats direct push as merge legitimacy NULL plus root authority containment evidence.
bypass_paths.risk: Direct push can mutate main without PREO_VALID, SCO visibility, or required GitHub checks.

bypass_paths.current_evidence: Branch protection policy disallows force pushes and merge governance treats history rewrites as legitimacy NULL plus root authority containment evidence.
bypass_paths.risk: Force push can rewrite proof lineage and enable stale review or check reuse.

bypass_paths.current_evidence: Branch protection and merge governance classify bypass as root authority evidence only, never merge legitimacy.
bypass_paths.risk: Admin or ruleset bypass can skip required checks outside PREO/SCO lineage.
